nasb.text: Now the priest of Midian had seven daughters; and they came to draw water and filled the troughs to water their father’s flock.

esv.text: Now the priest of Midian had seven daughters, and they came and drew water and filled the troughs to water their father’s flock.

cnv.text: 米甸的祭司有七個女兒，她們來打水，打滿了水槽，要給父親的羊群喝。

ccb.text: 米甸祭司的七个女儿来打水，要把水倒进槽里饮她们父亲的羊。
